cot_prefix: Okay, let's think through this question about causation in John's case. John has a terminal, incurable case of lung cancer caused by years of exposure to asbestos at work. He was never a smoker but was exposed to asbestos in the plastics division where he worked for 30 years. This lung cancer was terminal and would have killed him in a short time (estimated 2 months) regardless of any treatment.
